name: arcanon
description: Cross-repo service dependency scanner for Claude Code — maps your architecture, detects drift, and syncs to Arcanon Hub

api_token.description: Arcanon Hub API key (starts with arc_). Get one at https://app.arcanon.dev/settings/api-keys

hub_url.description: Arcanon Hub base URL. Defaults to https://api.arcanon.dev

auto_upload.description: Upload scan findings to Arcanon Hub automatically after every scan. Requires api_token.

project_slug.description: Project slug on Arcanon Hub (only required when using an org-scoped API key).
